Properties.Description: Downloads S3 zip, extracts text from source/doc files, returns XML for Bedrock prompts
Clones a public GitHub repo, zips the contents, uploads to S3
Ramio EC2 — SSM access + runtime AWS permissions granted by other constructs

UserData.Fn::Base64:
#!/bin/bash
#!/bin/bash
set -euxo pipefail
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y docker.io git
systemctl enable docker
systemctl start docker
usermod -aG docker ubuntu || true
